summary: CinePass system feature fully tested and verified. All backend API endpoints working correctly (12/12 tests passed). Frontend shows CinePass badge in header, Contest box on dashboard (replacing 'Mini Giochi'), and contests page with 3 daily contest cards.

minor.issue: UserResponse includes 'cinepass' field but older user DB records may not have it populated. The /api/cinepass/balance endpoint correctly returns the value.

critical_code_review_comments: CinePass costs correctly enforced: create_film=20, pre_engagement=5, emerging_screenplay=10, school_recruit=3, infrastructure=8-20 based on type
Daily contest system: 3 random contests per day from pool of 4 (budget_guess, cast_match, box_office, trivia_speed), max 50 CinePass/day
Login streak system: 7-day calendar (3,5,7,10,14,19,35 CinePass), 15-day bonus, Italian timezone noon reset
spend_cinepass() utility properly raises HTTPException if insufficient balance
Dashboard shows 'CONTEST' box with 'Guadagna CinePass' subtitle (not 'Mini Giochi')
context_for_next_testing_agent: CinePass feature complete. User already claimed today's login reward (streak=1). Contest data for today already generated. 2 of 3 contests completed (Box Office Prediction, Cast Perfetto), 1 available (Speed Producer). CinePass balance at 100. All deduction endpoints verified working (acting_school/train requires 3 CinePass). Note: There's an unrelated datetime error in process_offline_catchup that may need fixing.

GET /api/cinepass/costs.details: Returns all CinePass costs config with correct values: create_film=20, school_recruit=3, etc.

GET /api/cinepass/login-reward.details: Returns streak, claimed_today, next_day, next_reward, bonus_15, days[] array with 7 entries

POST /api/cinepass/claim-login-reward.details: Correctly rejects duplicate claims with 400 error when already claimed today

GET /api/cinepass/contests.details: Returns 3 daily contests with contest_id, name, description, reward, status, completed, total_earned

POST /api/cinepass/contests/{id}/start.details: Returns contest_id, type, challenge data for available contests

POST /api/cinepass/contests/{id}/submit.details: Returns correct, earned, total_earned_today, new_balance, all_completed

Locked contest prevention.details: Starting a locked contest returns 400 error

CinePass deduction - Acting School.details: POST /api/acting-school/train costs 3 CinePass as per CINEPASS_COSTS['school_recruit']

Frontend - CinePass badge.details: Header shows CinePass badge with cyan Ticket icon and balance (100)

Frontend - Contest page.details: Contests page at /games shows 3 contest cards with progress bar and start buttons

Frontend - Dashboard Contest box.details: Dashboard shows 'CONTEST' box with 'Guadagna CinePass' subtitle instead of 'Mini Giochi'

unrelated_issues_found.issue: TypeError in process_offline_catchup: can't subtract offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
unrelated_issues_found.note: Not CinePass related but causing 500 errors during login
